name: happy
description: Send email — recipient, subject, body editable.

input.title: Send the launch email?
input.description: The model drafted a launch email and proposed an updated recipient and subject. Edit any value before approving; the final values are sent.

fields.label: Subject
fields.proposed: Launching Acme Cloud — early access this Friday

fields.label: Body
fields.proposed:
Team,

Acme Cloud goes into early access this Friday at 09:00 UTC. Please review the rollout plan and flag any concerns by Wednesday EOD.

— Acme
